entity.name: Street Vendor Digitalization
entity.description: The Street Vendor Digitalization Project aims to modernize traditional vending by introducing digital tools. It helps vendors adopt cashless payments, build online visibility, and access government schemes. Through training in digital literacy and financial inclusion, the project empowers vendors to manage sales, connect with customers, and grow sustainably. In essence, it bridges the gap between informal street vending and the digital economy, boosting both vendor income and urban convenience.
entity.creator: sushmaprinceton525@gmail.com
